title: Hash Map Insert
description: Store data in a hash map and retrieve values based on their keys.
problemStatement:
Dictionaries! Import `std::collections::HashMap`. Create a new map, insert the key `"score"` with value `100`, and then print the value associated with `"score"`.

**Requirement:** Use `.insert()` and `.get()`.
hints: `.get()` returns an `Option<&V>`, as the key might not be in the map!
